codeReview.summary: The feature implementation and run artifacts satisfy the core objective of running targeted A/B experiments and producing comparative evidence. The transcript and artifacts show Tests A-D were executed, pcap/network analysis artifacts were produced, and the report captures the key latency pattern. I found two non-blocking quality issues around baseline comparability and naming/threshold consistency for 3-minute gaps.

issues.description: Baseline Test A stopped after 4 steps and is explicitly marked invalid for comparison, which weakens direct A-vs-B/C isolation. The overall conclusion is still supported by Tests B/C/D, but baseline comparability is incomplete.

The field name `has_3min_gap` is set with `gap > 120`, which is a >2-minute threshold. This can mislabel 2-minute delays as 3-minute gaps. Either rename the metric to match >2min or raise the threshold to align with 3-minute wording.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The debug-worker cleanup guidance is missing a safe pattern for process cleanup in shared environments. The worker hit a self-termination path when using pkill and had to recover with a PID-filtered approach.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session f2f4f0be-2024-487c-9b7d-9e33fc29c2fb) includes: "The pkill command terminated our own shell. Let me be more careful...". Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges also requests guidance for concurrent-worker cleanup behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Timeout guidance is inconsistent across mission artifacts and feature instructions, which can cause procedure drift during experiment features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md line 47 and .factory/skills/debug-worker/SKILL.md line 42 prescribe `timeout 1800`, while the targeted-ab-experiments feature description requires `timeout 900` per test.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Common experiment cleanup commands are not codified in services.yaml, so workers are forced to use ad hoc cleanup command sequences.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml lines 1-7 only define install/test/lint/typecheck/import sorting commands; no reusable command exists for stale process/container cleanup used by this mission.

summary: Reviewed feature targeted-ab-experiments (commit 004a026) across feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill instructions, and commit diff. Marked PASS with two non-blocking issues: invalid baseline comparability in Test A and a 3-minute gap naming/threshold mismatch. Logged three shared-state observations covering cleanup procedure guidance, timeout convention mismatch, and missing reusable cleanup commands in services.
